raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The paper claims a three-direction extension with specific tradeoff recoveries; checking whether the abstention-WER argument, the self-supervised-encoder premise, and cross-benchmark conclusions cohere internally is a natural expectation for any 'look at this' applied to a research excerpt.","R1.3":"Multiple precise quantitative claims are asserted (38% WER reduction at 12% refusal; 22% decoding-cost drop; 41% relative WER at 2.4% abstention on CDC-2k); alignment between these numbers and their stated experimental conditions is load-bearing regardless of review intent.","R1.7":"A named prior work — 'Vaibhava and Hermansky (2018)' with a specific loss (chow-hinge), backbone (LAS), and result (38% on LibriSpeech test-other at 12% refusal) — anchors the entire contribution claim; reference accuracy and attribution are directly checkable and central to the argument."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you primarily asking for a factual/logical accuracy check (claim support, citation correctness, internal consistency), or for writing-quality feedback (clarity, style, prose)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The paper claims a three-direction extension with specific tradeoff recoveries; checking whether the abstention-WER argument, the self-supervised-encoder premise, and cross-benchmark conclusions cohere internally is a natural expectation for any 'look at this' applied to a research excerpt.
rationale.R1.3: Multiple precise quantitative claims are asserted (38% WER reduction at 12% refusal; 22% decoding-cost drop; 41% relative WER at 2.4% abstention on CDC-2k); alignment between these numbers and their stated experimental conditions is load-bearing regardless of review intent.
rationale.R1.7: A named prior work — 'Vaibhava and Hermansky (2018)' with a specific loss (chow-hinge), backbone (LAS), and result (38% on LibriSpeech test-other at 12% refusal) — anchors the entire contribution claim; reference accuracy and attribution are directly checkable and central to the argument.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you primarily asking for a factual/logical accuracy check (claim support, citation correctness, internal consistency), or for writing-quality feedback (clarity, style, prose)?
